label: Strategy Family Browser
description: Browse all 65+ strategy types across DeFi, CeFi, TradFi, and Sports, grouped by family with configurable parameters.

0.4.note: no any/ts-ignore (StrategyCatalogEntry[] cast is typed, not any).

0.8.note: error guard added: renders 'Failed to load strategy catalog.' in text-destructive when useStrategyCatalog returns error.

1.1.note: data from useStrategyCatalog() hook, no inline fetch/import.

1.2.note: strategy type catalog widget showing all 65+ strategy definitions system-wide; not scoped to org/client/strategy. Scope filtering does not apply to a reference catalog.

1.7.note: DOMAIN_COLORS is a local display constant (not reference data needing migration); catalog data served from API.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (browse available strategy types), paper ✓ (same), batch ✓ (same — reference catalog is mode-agnostic).

3.2.note: Widget does not read scope or mode — it is a reference catalog. Mode does not change its data.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget behavior unchanged — it's a read-only catalog browser.

3.3.note: No order entry buttons — read-only catalog.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch indicator behavior (may not need one for catalog).

l3.notes: Agent checks done. Widget is effectively mode-agnostic. Human should verify 3.4.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers. Domain filter buttons call setSelectedDomain — functional.

4.2.note: No href links in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: strategy table shows ID, label, domain badge, parameters for each family.

4.4.note: Human verify: domain filter buttons (all/defi/cefi/tradfi/sports) filter correctly.

4.7.note: No tabs/collapsible sections (family groupings are always visible).

4.8.note: Human verify: max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto scroll works within widget bounds.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.4, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all 65+ strategy types across DeFi, CeFi, TradFi, Sports. Widget is a discovery/reference browser — not tied to execution.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. Human must verify 5.2-5.6 — in this case, primarily 5.6 (all domain filters work for each asset class).

l6.notes: L6 not started — deferred until L5 human walkthrough complete.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. DOMAIN_COLORS uses Tailwind class strings, not hex literals. CLEAN.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget; data from useStrategyCatalog() hook.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo deps to check. CLEAN.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on Badge (line 102). --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) is defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro on parameter Badge.

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle (ui), Badge (ui), Table (ui), Spinner (shared). Shared primitives.

8.4.note: Domain filter buttons lacked type='button' and aria attributes. Fixed: added type='button', aria-label, and aria-pressed.
8.4.fix: Added type='button', aria-label='Filter by {domain}', aria-pressed={selectedDomain === d} to each domain filter button

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=6, minH=5. max-h-[500px] scroll area may conflict with widget height constraints.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro token applied). 8.4 fixed. 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.5 human-verify pending — max-h-[500px] is a potential layout issue at minH.

mergeCandidate.rationale: Both are strategy browsing widgets. strategies-catalogue shows live instances; strategy-family-browser shows strategy type definitions. Could be merged as tabs within one widget — but semantics differ (instances vs. types).

relationships.notes: Reference catalog widget — displays strategy type definitions from useStrategyCatalog API, not live strategy instances. Distinct from strategies-catalogue which shows running strategy instances.

dataContract.notes: Data via useStrategyCatalog(domain?) hook (react-query). Hook likely calls /api/strategies/catalog. Currently returns mock data from API mock layer. Production: strategy catalog service.

gaps: max-h-[500px] hardcoded may overflow/conflict with widget height at minH=5
No parameter editing in this view — read-only catalog
'predictions' domain not in DOMAINS filter array
coverage.notes: Widget does not include 'predictions' in DOMAINS filter (only all/defi/cefi/tradfi/sports). If prediction strategies are in catalog, they may be hidden.

findings.description: strategy-family-browser-widget.tsx — error state was missing; useStrategyCatalog returns error from react-query but it was ignored
findings.fix: Added error guard before empty-state check — renders 'Failed to load strategy catalog.' in text-destructive
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: strategy-family-browser-widget.tsx:102 — text-[10px] arbitrary font-size on Badge; no text-2xs token in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px) on parameter Badge.

findings.description: strategy-family-browser-widget.tsx:59 — domain filter <button> elements missing type='button', aria-label, aria-pressed
findings.fix: Added type='button', aria-label='Filter by {domain}', aria-pressed={selectedDomain === d} to each domain filter button
